title: Use of zebularine for promoting wound healing and regeneration
abstract: In one aspect, the present invention provides a composition comprising zebularine, a nucleotide inhibitor of DNA methyltransferase, optionally in combination with retinoic acid, and said composition for use in promoting complex tissue regeneration and wound healing in a subject. In another aspect the present invention provides zebularine as a therapeutic agent, optionally in combination with retinoic acid, for use in promoting regeneration and healing of wounds resulting from mechanical injuries and/or chemical injuries and/or burns and/or radiation injuries and/or surgical operations and/or other pathological conditions.
claims: Claims 1. A pharmaceutical composition characterized in that it comprises zebularine and/or a salt thereof and at least one pharmaceutically acceptable carrier. 2. The pharmaceutical composition of claim 1 characterized in that it further comprises retinoic acid or a salt thereof or retinoic acid metabolites. 3. The composition of claims 1 -2 wherein the chemical compounds promote regeneration and healing of wounds resulting from mechanical injuries, chemical injuries, bums, radiation injuries, surgical operations or pathological conditions. 4. The use of the composition of claim 1 as a therapeutic agent to promote regeneration and healing of wounds resulting from mechanical injuries and/or chemical injuries and/or bums and/or radiation injuries and/or surgical operations and/or other pathological conditions. 5. The invention of claim 4 wherein the therapeutic agent displays demethylating activity. 6. The invention of claim 4 wherein the therapeutic agent activates silenced genes, preferably pluripotency genes. 7. A method for promoting regeneration and wound healing, comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of a pharmaceutical composition of claim 1. 8. A method for promoting regeneration and wound healing, comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of a pharmaceutical composition of claim 2. 9. The invention of claims 7-8 wherein the delivery' of said composition promotes regeneration and healing of chronic wounds and non-healing wounds such as in the case of pressure ulcers, diabetic complications and peripheral artery' disease. 10. The invention of claims 7-8 wherein regeneration of complex tissues occurs which encompasses dermis and epidermis, hair, hair follicles and sweat glands, cartilage , neurons, blood vessels, muscles. 11. Use of zebularine and/or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof for the manufacture of medicaments for promoting regeneration or healing of wounds resulting from mechanical, chemical, thermal, radiation, surgical or pathological conditions. 12. Combined use of zebularine and retinoic acid and/or a pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof for the manufacture of medicaments for promoting regeneration or healing of wounds resulting from mechanical, chemical, thermal, radiation, surgical or pathological conditions. 13. Use according to claims 11 and 12 wherein the medicament contains at least one pharmaceutically acceptable carrier and/or diluent. 14. Use according to claims 1 1 and 12, wherein the medicaments are in the form of ointments, creams, sprays, injections or tablets.
